kw.name: Criar Sessao
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=serverest, url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Cria uma sessão para a API ServeRest utilizando a URL base definida nas variáveis:

test.name: CT-A01 Login válido

kw.name: Gerar Email Aleatorio
Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Gera um email aleatório para uso nos testes de criação de usuários:

kw.name: Criar Usuario
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '107', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "User Login", "email": "user_fhhOr@email.com", "password": "password123", "administrador": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Cria um usuário utilizando um nome, email, senha e status de administrador, retornando a resposta da requisição:

kw.name: Realizar Login
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/login path_url=/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '60', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "user_fhhOr@email.com", "password": "password123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Realiza o login na API ServeRest utilizando email e senha, retornando a resposta da requisição:

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

test.doc: Testa o login com credenciais válidas

test.name: CT-A02 Login inválido

kw.name: Status Should Be

kw.name: Validar Contrato Login
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Valida os elementos do contrato da resposta do login:

test.doc: Valida o contrato da resposta do login

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/produtos path_url=/produtos headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJlbWFpbCI6InVzZXJfeUtKRXNAZW1haWwuY29tIiwicGFzc3dvcmQiOiJwYXNzd29yZDEyMyIsImlhdCI6MTc3NDYyNDAyNCwiZXhwIjoxNzc0NjI0NjI0fQ.Z1wjKPErcs-CmJqiNyms-kwLxY7Dt4rFqcsY3rWbt2M', 'Content-Length': '83', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Produto sYNkn", "preco": "100", "descricao": "Teste", "quantidade": "10"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
Cria um produto utilizando um token de autenticação e valida o status esperado:

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/carrinhos path_url=/carrinhos headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJlbWFpbCI6InVzZXJfeUtKRXNAZW1haWwuY29tIiwicGFzc3dvcmQiOiJwYXNzd29yZDEyMyIsImlhdCI6MTc3NDYyNDAyNCwiZXhwIjoxNzc0NjI0NjI0fQ.Z1wjKPErcs-CmJqiNyms-kwLxY7Dt4rFqcsY3rWbt2M', 'Content-Length': '68', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"produtos": [{"idProduto": "eBsQFyxiB181YawJ", "quantidade": "1"}]}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
